title: Saffron SMP
description: The collection of mods I plan to use on my personal server with my friends. Designed purely for the use of me and my friends.
body:
![The Logo for the Saffron SMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dffe2cf4fb00921e038db666af4b598df749fbcd.png)


In it's current state it is used purely for the purpose of admin testing by myself and and use by friends for the same reason. I will later add both a client and server version for use by the players and for the server respectively. While there aren't as many performance mods as some would normally use, for the time being I've tried to keep the not completely unneccessary mods at a minimum, the main ones being Sodium (and some QoL mods for it; Sodium Extras and Reese's Sodium Options) and Iris along with some shaders.

I've designed it to be a fantasy/medieval themed modpack. However, without utilising the Item Obliterator mod there are still some aspects that have a more modern theme and don't fit in well with the theme of the rest of the modpack. I mainly used to remove some of the modern themed buttons in the Infinity Buttons mod.

## Future Plans
It is still in Beta and I have experimented with using alternative versions and alternative mod loaders in order to try and gain access to a wider variety of mods (mainly Firework Frenzy). Recently Firework Frenzy has been updated to Fabric 1.20.1 so I no longer have to mess around with different versions as much. The latest version (version 1.0.6 - Admin) is likely going to be very similar to the final version (if not the final version itself).
